case_title: PURVIS, MARIA vs. AUERBACH INTERNATIONAL INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PURVIS, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT AUERBACH INTERNATIONAL INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PURVIS, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUERBACH INTERNATIONAL INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP. $8,487.21 PRINCIPAL, $93.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,580.21
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,000.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $415.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PURVIS, MARIA
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AUERBACH INTERNATIONAL INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PURVIS, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT AUERBACH INTERNATIONAL INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $5,712.73 DEFICIT AS OF 1/2/03 IS $2,122.02. AS TO DEFENDANT AUERBACH INTERNATIONAL INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP.
